THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRISOSTOMO, ROGER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPT. PUBLIC WORKS $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,075.00, PLAINTIFF DECLARATIONS ESTABLISH THAT HE OWNED TOOLS WORTH APPROX $2500. PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY AND WRITTEN DECLARATION ESTABLISH THAT DPW CONFISCATED THESE TOOLS PLUS PERSONAL EFFECTS. I AWARD $3000 AS A CONSERVATIVE ESTIMATE OF WHAT WAS NOT RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF BEARS THE BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-29-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ROGER CRISOSTOMO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (CCSF) IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARLENE GREEN, CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR. PARTIES REQUESTED A PROGRESS REPORT CONTINUANCE TO EXECUTE A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE AUGUST HEARING DATE, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
